snippet.title: Hurricane - LOCO LOCO - Serbia 🇷🇸  - Official Music Video - Eurovision 2021
snippet.description:
Hurricane will represent Serbia at the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 with the song LOCO LOCO.
-
Composer: Nemanja Antonić
Lyrics: Sanja Vučić
Arrangement: Nemanja Antonić, Darko Dimitrov
-
Lyrics:
Nemoj da se ljutiš, hrabrost skupi
Jedna cura kao ja ne traži obećanja
Ne skidaš taj pogled ti sa mene
Lako ušla sam ja u tvoje vene

Osmeh tvoj mi kaže
Da me želiš koga lažeš
Slatka kao ćoko moko
Hajde budi loco

Ram ba-ba-bam
A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biže lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco

Baby, baby, baby, čemu drama
Jedna cura kao ja ne traži obećanja
Baby, baby, baby, igram sama
To što nisi sa mnom to je tvoja mana

Osmeh tvoj mi kaže
Da me želiš koga lažeš
Slatka kao čoko moko
Hajde budi loco

1, 2... Girls, Come on!
Loco loco
Loco loco
Loco loco

Ne skidaš pogled sa mene
Lako sam ti ušla u vene
Hajde budi loco loco

A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biće lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco
A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biće lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco

-

If you want to know more about the Eurovision Song Contest, visit https://eurovision.tv

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) – our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceX’s site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10’s Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX’s third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

More Late Late Show:
Subscribe: http://bit.ly/CordenYouTube
Watch Full Episodes: http://bit.ly/1ENyPw4
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/19PIHLC
Twitter: http://bit.ly/1Iv0q6k
Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: MANCA ŠPIK & ROK PILETIČ - NA VALENTINOVO (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Ponosno vam predstavljamo nov duet v nepričakovani kombinaciji! Posebej za skladbo NA VALENTINOVO sta vokalne moči združila Manca Špik in Rok Piletič. Življenje piše takšne in drugačne zgodbe o ljubezni. NA VALENTINOVO je ena izmed tistih, s katero se v življenju vsaj enkrat soočimo skoraj vsi.  Verjamemo, da bo pesem tudi vas presunila, kot je nas. 

Kdaj pa ste vi nazadnje imeli strto srce?👇Komentirajte👇.

besedilo: Rok Lunaček & Marjetka Vovk

NA VALENTINOVO 

JAZ IN TI ZA VEDNO, 
SVA SI REKLA
DA NAJU NIČ NE ZLOMI, 
SAJ SE LJUBIVA.

VERJELA, DA NAD NAMA,
VEDNO JASNO BO NEBO,
V DOBREM IN V SLABEM,
A NI BILO TAKO.

STISNI ME V SLOVO, 
NA VALENTINOVO 
DA MI BO LEPO, 
DA MI BO MANJ HUDO,
ČAS NAJ POHITI, 
SOLZE POSUŠI,
DA MI LAŽJE BO.

STISNI ME MOČNO, 
LJUBEZEN NAJINO,
ZA VSE KAR JE LEPO, 
MED NAMA KDAJ BILO,
ČAS NAJ POHITI,
SRCE NAJ UMIRI,
NA VALENTINOVO. 

AAAAAA …. 

ČEZ NOČ SE JE ZGODILO,
HLADNA POSTELJA,
KDAJ SVA POZABILA, 
NA TO, KAR SVA BILA.

ZNOVA ŠTEJEM ZVEZDE, 
IN V VSAKI NAJDEM TE,
NOČ, NE MOREM SPATI,
KER JOČE MI SRCE. 

STISNI ME V SLOVO, 
NA VALENTINOVO 
DA MI BO LEPO, 
DA MI BO MANJ HUDO,
ČAS NAJ POHITI, 
SOLZE POSUŠI,
DA MI LAŽJE BO.


STISNI ME MOČNO, 
LJUBEZEN NAJINO,
ZA VSE KAR JE LEPO, 
MED NAMA KDAJ BILO,
ČAS NAJ POHITI,
SRCE NAJ UMIRI,
NA VALENTINOVO. 

ZDAJ PA SAMA, NA POTI,
UUU, ISKALA BOVA SREČO ZNOVA,
NAJ TE NAJDE,
NAJ ME NAJDE ŠE KDAJ, OOO… 

STISNI ME V SLOVO, 
NA VALENTINOVO 
ČAS NAJ POHITI, 
SOLZE POSUŠI,
DA MI LAŽJE BO.


STISNI ME MOČNO, 
LJUBEZEN NAJINO,
ZA VSE KAR JE LEPO, 
MED NAMA KDAJ BILO,
ČAS NAJ POHITI,
SRCE NAJ UMIRI,
NA VALENTINOVO. 


STISNI ME MOČNO,
DA MI BO MANJ HUDO,
NA VALENTINOVO.

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover’s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Sen Çal Kapımı 34. Bölüm
snippet.description:
Eda, Serkan’ın onu öpmesiyle her şeyi hatırladığı ümidine kapılır. Neden bunu yaptığını Serkan’a sorarken, Serkan’ın cevabı öfkelenmesine neden olur. Serkan’ın bu hamlesi ikisi arasındaki aşk oyununu daha da kızıştırır. Peki bu aşk oyununu Eda mı Serkan mı yoksa sadece “aşk” mı kazanacak?

Sen Çal Kapımı Ailesine Katılmak için: https://bit.ly/3jB1Rsj﻿
Sen Çal Kapımı Resmi Youtube Kanalı: https://bit.ly/3dxNPVW

Kerem Bürsin ve Hande Erçel’in yanı sıra Neslihan Yeldan, İlayda Çevik, Evrim Doğan, Anıl İlter, Melisa Döngel, Çağrı Çıtanak, Elçin Afacan, Sitare Akbaş, Başak Gümülcinelioğlu, Alican Aytekin, Sarp Bozkurt, İlkyaz Arslan gibi birbirinden başarılı isimleri barındıyor.


#SenÇalKapımı #KeremBürsin #HandeErçel

snippet.title: Reacting to Luka Doncic saying 'you can't compare me to Larry Bird' | The Jump
snippet.description:
Rachel Nichols, Richard Jefferson and Matt Barnes discuss Dallas Mavericks star Luka Doncic saying "you can't compare me to Larry Bird."

0:00 Rachel replays her interview when Luka shrugged off Bird comparisons.
0:52 Matt disagrees with Luka.
1:27 Richard thinks Luka was right to say what he said.

snippet.title: Full Replay: Starship SN10 Flight Test, Landing, and Post-Flight BOOM!
snippet.description:
SpaceX is set to launch the Starship SN10 prototype to an altitude of approximately 10 kilometers. A launch attempt is possible between 9 am and 6 pm Central time on Wednesday. However, as with testing, there is always a chance that teams could decide to stand down and try again on a different day.

snippet.title: Watch NASA’s Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Dvanaest godina nije obukao čarape
snippet.description:
Žarko Hrgić i Zenice neobičan je po svemu. Dvanaest godina živi u špilji uz Babinu rijeku  bez struje i vode. Nikada vatru nije naložio, nikada se nije razbolio a jedan od njegovih recepata je život bez čarapa na nogama. Umjesto čarapa Žarko noge oblaže prvo papirom od vreća za brašno a zatim sve to obloži najlonom. Nakon toga obuva obuća na noge. Bez obzira na vanjsku temperaturu Žare ne nosi čarape. Pogledajte video koji smo snimili kod kontejnera za otpad koje Žarko svakodnevno posjećuje.
Pridružite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

snippet.title: Sen Çal Kapımı 33. Bölüm
snippet.description:
Eda ve Serkan masum bir uykunun kollarındayken, Selin ve Deniz’e yakalanırlar. Selin’in ne olursa olsun Serkan’dan vazgeçmeye niyeti yoktur. Serkan o geceden sonra Eda ile ilgili duygularını sorgulamaya başlar. Eda ise, her şeye rağmen aşkı için pes etmeyip oyuna devam eder. Serkan, Eda’ya giden kalbine güvenmeyi seçip aklındaki sorularla ona gitmeye karar verir. Peki bu gidiş Serkan’a Eda’yı hatırlatacak mıdır?

Sen Çal Kapımı Ailesine Katılmak için: https://bit.ly/3jB1Rsj﻿
Sen Çal Kapımı Resmi Youtube Kanalı: https://bit.ly/3dxNPVW

Kerem Bürsin ve Hande Erçel’in yanı sıra Neslihan Yeldan, İlayda Çevik, Evrim Doğan, Anıl İlter, Melisa Döngel, Çağrı Çıtanak, Elçin Afacan, Sitare Akbaş, Başak Gümülcinelioğlu, Alican Aytekin, Sarp Bozkurt, İlkyaz Arslan gibi birbirinden başarılı isimleri barındıyor.


#kokundaaşkvar #KeremBürsin #HandeErçel

snippet.title: POLKAHOLIKI - BELA ROŽA (Official Video)
snippet.description:
POLKAHOLIKI počinju 2021. godinu sa svojim prvim valcerom! Ma da je već u imenu Polkaholiki jasno da im je polka najdraža, također obožavaju i valcere. BIJELA RUŽA je pjesma o ljubavi, čekanju, nadi... Pravi romantični glazbeni film sa dvoje zaljubljenih!

SI: POLKAHOLIKI začenjajo leto s prvim VALČKOM! Čeprav so POLKAholiki, obožujejo vso narodnozabavno glasbo! BELA ROŽA, pesem o ljubezni, čakanju in upanju, romantična zgodba o dveh zaljubljencih, je tu!  

LYRICS 🇸🇮

Gledam za tabo, štejem korake,
zdaj si le pika daleč stran.
Solze velike, nikdar enake,
a mi bo pesem krajšala dan.

Vse sva imela, več si hotela,
srečo iskala boš drugje,
jaz pa še upam, nate še čakam,
še verjamem v čudeže.

BELA ROŽA BO CVETELA
VSE DOKLER NE BOŠ NAZAJ,
BELA ROŽA, DA ME SPOMNI
NA NAJLEPŠI NAJIN MAJ.

ŠE CVETI IN NE OVENE,
LE ODPADE KAKŠEN CVET,
BELA ROŽA ZA SPOMINE,
DA ME VRNE K TEBI SPET.

Žalost je lažja, včasih izgine,
kadar si lažem, da mi gre.
A tvoja koža, mehka kot svila,
je predaleč, daleč je.

Hodim po poti, kot da si z mano,
upanje pa še tiho tli.
Ko enkrat ljubiš, pač ne pozabiš,
to ostane, ne zbledi.

LYRICS 🇭🇷

Gledam za tobom, brojim korake,
sada si samo točka daleko od mene. 
Suze velike, nikad iste,
a pjesma mi je skratila dan.

Sve smo imali, htjela si više,
sreću ćeš tražiti drugdje,
a ja se još nadam, tebe još čekam,
još vjerujem u čuda.

BIJELA RUŽA ĆE PROCVIJETATI
SVE DOK SE NE VRATIŠ NAZAD
BIJELA RUŽA, DA ME PODSJETI
NA NAJLJEPŠI NAŠ SVIBANJ.

JOŠ CVIJETA I NE VENE,
OTPADA SAMO PO KOJI CVIJET.
BIJELA RUŽA ZA USPOMENE,
DA ME VRATI TEBI OPET.

Tuga je lakša, ponekad nestane
kad si lažem, da mi ide.
Ali tvoja koža, mekana kao  svila,
predaleko je, daleko je.

Hodam po putu, kao da si sa mnom, 
nada još tiho tinja
Kad jednom voliš, ne zaboraviš,
to ostaje, ne blijedi.


Music: Raay // Lyrics: Rok Lunaček & Maja Kvertkov // music production: M-MEDIA, Sodražica 2021 // glazbena producenta: Tadej Mihelič & Raay // video by: NEO VISUALS, 2021 // Executive producer: Raay 
 
Zahvala Polkaholikov:
ISKRENA HVALA vsem za pomoč pri nastajanju videospota!
- lokacija: Ranč Rogoza
- ples - koreografija: Tjaša Roš, Maruša Krušič (Plesno mesto)
- Teo Butolen / hvala za super jeklenega konjička in nostalgijo z Yugom
- Mesarija Fingušt
 
Matic, Žiga, Rene in Gašper! Vaši POLKAHOLIKI!
 
FOLLOW POLKAHOLIKI
INSTAGRAM: @polkaholiki 
email: polkaholiki@gmail.com
GSM kontakt / management: +386 31 568 405
FB: https://www.facebook.com/polkaholiki/
 
Pretplati se na JoomBoos, stisni zvonce i ne propusti niti jedan video: http://bit.ly/joomboos_subscribe ✔
Znaš li da imamo i TikTok? Zaprati nas: https://vm.tiktok.com/Xs7PCb/ 
Čekiraj  naš web i zabavi se uz mnoštvo kvizova, savjeta i novosti iz YouTube svijeta:  https://joomboos.hr/
I ovdje smo:
INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/joomboosyt/
VIDEOSTAR INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/joomboos.vi...
FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/joombooshr/
 
Dobrodošao na JoomBoos - zajednicu za sve one koji su strastveni u kreiranju video sadržaja.

Gledam za tobom, brojim korake,
sada si samo točka daleko od mene. 
Suze velike, nikad iste,
a pjesma mi je skratila dan.

Sve smo imali, htjela si više,
sreću ćeš tražiti drugdje,
a ja se još nadam, tebe još čekam,
još vjerujem u čuda.

BIJELA RUŽA ĆE PROCVIJETATI
SVE DOK SE NE VRATIŠ NAZAD
BIJELA RUŽA, DA ME PODSJETI
NA NAJLJEPŠI NAŠ SVIBANJ.

JOŠ CVIJETA I NE VENE,
OTPADA SAMO PO KOJI CVIJET.
BIJELA RUŽA ZA USPOMENE,
DA ME VRATI TEBI OPET.

Tuga je lakša, ponekad nestane
kad si lažem, da mi ide.
Ali tvoja koža, mekana kao  svila,
predaleko je, daleko je.

Hodam po putu, kao da si sa mnom, 
nada još tiho tinja
Kad jednom voliš, ne zaboraviš,
to ostaje, ne blijedi.


Music: Raay // Lyrics: Rok Lunaček & Maja Kvertkov // music production: M-MEDIA, Sodražica 2021 // glazbena producenta: Tadej Mihelič & Raay // video by: NEO VISUALS, 2021 // Executive producer: Raay

snippet.title: Emanet 130. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 130 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#Shorts

snippet.title: NASA’S Perseverance Rover’s First 360 View of Mars (Official)
snippet.description:
This video shows the first 360-degree view of the landing site of NASA’s Perseverance rover on Mars, as captured by the rover’s color Navigation Cameras, or Navcams. The Navcams are on the remote sensing mast (or “head”) of the rover.  Perseverance possesses the most cameras of any Mars rover to date, with 19 on the rover. Perseverance landed on Mars’ Jezero Crater on February 18, 2021. These images were obtained on February 20, 2021. 

A key objective for Perseverance’s mission on Mars is astrobiology, including the search for signs of ancient microbial life. The rover will characterize the planet’s geology and past climate, pave the way for human exploration of the Red Planet, and be the first mission to collect and cache Martian rock and regolith.


Please note: Not all browsers support viewing 360 videos. YouTube supports their playback on computers using Chrome, Firefox, Internet Explorer, and Opera browsers. For best experience on a mobile device, play this video in the YouTube app.

For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance


Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

—————**About Piper Rockelle**—————
Shalom guys, I’m Piper Rockelle I’m a girl living my dream in Hollywood. On this channel we believe in entertainment, quality, family, fun, love, and good vibes. snippet.title: Emanet 128. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 128 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Starlink Mission
snippet.description:
SpaceX is targeting 3:24 a.m. EST on Thursday, March 4 for launch of 60 Starlink satellites from Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A) at Kennedy Space Center in Florida. If needed, there are backup opportunities available at 5:42 a.m. EST on Thursday, March 4, as well as 3:03 a.m. EST and 5:21 a.m. EST on Friday, March 5.

The Falcon 9 first stage rocket booster supporting this mission previously flew on seven missions: the Iridium-8 mission, the Telstar 18 VANTAGE mission, and five Starlink missions. Following stage separation, SpaceX will land Falcon 9’s first stage on the “Of Course I Still Love You” droneship, which will be located in the Atlantic Ocean. One half of Falcon 9’s fairing previously flew on three Starlink missions, and the other half previously supported two Starlink missions.

snippet.title: Meatpacking: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver (HBO)
snippet.description:

snippet.description:

hr.title: Diana ima vezu s košarkašem, ali po kojoj cijeni? | Dima će se boriti za ljubav!
hr.description:
S Dianom i Janom u školi više nitko ne razgovara, jer su opsjednuti košarkašima i zaboravili na svoje prijatelje. No, djevojke ovo ne zanimaju puno, imaju plan kako privući pažnju košarkaša, kako bi im svi pozavidjeli. Kakav su plan smislile djevojke? A koliko će ih to koštati? Pogledajte ovu seriju!
Pretplatite se na kanal! 👩‍👩‍👦‍👦
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJuIFPGd2r5UM2rD2LGgvFg?sub_confirmation=1
Ne zaboravite na zvono! 🔔🔔🔔
Hvala na vašim lajkovima! ❤️❤️❤️

snippet.title: Top 30 Frequently Asked Questions about Boris (Q&A)
snippet.description:
JOIN channel, become friend: https://www.youtube.com/lifeofboris/join
Anatoli channel: https://youtube.com/c/lifeofanatolistar

00:00 intro
00:54 top 30 questions
19:43 extra 10 questions

I asked on community tab for everyone to send me their biggest questions. I expected big results. I did not expect 2500+ comments though. I picked the top 30 most highly rated questions and answered them. As honestly as I can. There was questions about face reveal. There was questions about my origin and history. I reveal a lot of info. A lot of it is new info. These are the most frequently asked questions about Boris.
Enjoy.

snippet.title: Bitcoin CRASHING Right NOW (BEST Ethereum & Cardano Analysis)
snippet.description:
Bitcoin right now is CRASHING. But why exactly is Bitcoin falling? Today we analyze the Bitcoin price & look at where it could be heading to. I’ll tell you the price point at where I see Bitcoin bouncing back up. We also discuss Cardano & Ethereum. ETH is getting CRUSHED right now, but will it bounce back? Find out what needs to happen.

I’ll give you my updated Bitcoin trading strategy and tell you why I’m not trading on Sundays, and I’m skeptical about the weekend. I’ll reveal a pattern I’ve noticed about the Bitcoin price action at the end of the last few months.

snippet.title: See Mars Like Never Before! NASA's Perseverance Rover Sends New Video and Images of the Red Planet
snippet.description: NASA’s Perseverance Mars Rover safely touched down on the Red Planet on Feb. 18. So what will the robotic scientist "see" on her descent and what will she do next? Join mission experts for update about the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – including imagery it captured and its mission to explore Mars.

LYRICS:
Svaki sat, svaki sprat ja sam brojala,
Noćima ispred tvojih vrata plakala.
I kad ljubav u tebi ne osećam,
Ne dam ja na tebe - MOJE.

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Moj si lom, moj si slom, moj si brodolom,
Ja u tebi sve sam našla.

Moj si, moj savršen greh, neću, ne želim da stanem,
Ja bih da zagrlim te, a ti bi da odeš odavde.
Moj si, moj melek, moj bol!
Kako da pomerim s’ tobom kraj?
U oči dok gledam te sad, k’o dete u porušen grad...

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Boli kad zaplače u meni ta devojčica, što voli te, voli te, voli te...

snippet.title: Game Theory: Your Shiny Pokemon is DOOMED to Die!
snippet.description:
Special thanks to Audible for sponsoring this video!
Get a FREE 30 Day trial of Audible! ► http://audible.com/matpat
Or text matpat to 500-500 

We all love when a shiny version of our favorite Pokemon shows up, right? It is a welcome surprise to any video or card game! Except, those shinies are not as great as we all think. Don't get me wrong, they LOOK amazing but they are lacking one very important thing in the Pokemon universe. That thing, Theorists, is POWER! Shines are WEAK! Not only that, but they are DOOMED! Why? You will have to watch to find out!

More About The Game Here ► https://swordshield.pokemon.com/

SUBSCRIBE to Catch all the Theories! ► https://goo.gl/kQWHkJ

You will have to watch to find out!

More About The Game Here ► https://swordshield.pokemon.com/

snippet.title: Game Recap: Mavericks 115, Nets 98
snippet.description: The Mavericks defeated the Nets, 115-98, snapping Brooklyns eight-game win streak. Luka Doncic recorded 27 points, six rebounds and seven assists for the Mavericks, while Kristaps Porzingis added 18 points, four rebounds and three blocks in the victory. James Harden tallied 29 points, seven rebounds and six assists for the Nets in the losing effort. The Mavericks improve to 16-16 on the season, while the Nets fall to 22-13.

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing Overview- NOW SAFE ON MARS!!!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA
Main rover landing page- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

Music for the montage-

Explosions in the Sky
(Post-rock, four-member band from Texas.)

First Breath After Coma
https://youtu.be/w0o8JCxjjpM

Your Hand In Mine
https://youtu.be/cdiY6kijYHE

Song at 11:21- Bottles by A Shell in the Pit- https://open.spotify.com/track/0m6GMysIDx3gcQc6TF6HEX?si=FhjTlbBbQKayFrYtrw0dlg

snippet.title: Jasminë çmendet pas Andit, dhe “lufton” shoqen e saj Sarën - Përputhen, 26 Shkurt 2021
snippet.description:
Për'Puthen është një talk show dashurie, i cili sjell histori të vërteta dhe të gjalla të njohjeve mes të rinjve . Ashtu sikundër ato ndodhin në jetën reale, pa filtra. Aty paraqitet zhvillimi i njohjeve të reja mes protagonistëve, por trajtohen edhe fenomene që ndodhin çdo ditë në shoqërinë tonë, përtej shkëlqimit të televizionit. 

Autore: Olsa Muhameti
Moderatore: Bora Zemani
Opinionist: Arjan Konomi

“Cover Me In Sunshine”
 
I’ve been dreaming 
friendly faces
I’ve got so much time to kill
 
just imagine 
people laughing
I know some day we will
 
and even if it’s far away
get me through another day
 
cover me in sunshine
shower me with good times
tell me that the world’s been spinning since the beginning 
and everything’ll be alright
cover me in sunshine
 
from a distance 
all these mountains
are just some tiny hills
 
wildflowers 
they keep living 
while they’re just standing still 
 
I’ve been missing yesterday 
but what if theres a better place
 
cover me in sunshine
shower me with good times
tell me that the world’s been spinning since the beginning 
and everything’ll be alright
cover me in sunshine
shower me with good times
tell me that the world’s been spinning since the beginning 
and everything’ll be alright
cover me in sunshine
 
La la la 
 
cover me in sunshine
shower me with good times
tell me that the world’s been spinning since the beginning 
and everything’ll be alright
cover me in sunshine

snippet.title: Дан заљубљених у Дијаниној школи | Кога ће Диана одабрати?
snippet.description:
Дан заљубљених се одржава у школи, а сви дечаци и девојчице припремили су поклоне за своје сродне душе. Али осећања нису увек обострана, а неки имају и неколико обожавалаца. Кога ће Диана одабрати? Дима или кошаркаш? Погледајте у овој серији!
Још један видео:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2hsc80Z5lKw
Претплатите се на канал!👩‍👩‍👦‍👦 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJuIFPGd2r5UM2rD2LGgvFg?sub_confirmation=1
Не заборавите на звоно!🔔🔔🔔
Хвала на вашим свиђањима!❤️❤️❤️

hr.title: Valentinovo u Dianinoj školi | Koga će Diana odabrati?
hr.description:

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32’ to tie at one and added two more in the 65’ and 85’. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70’ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27’ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: Mission Control Live: NASA Lands Perseverance Mars Rover (360 video)
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. Watch here for a 360-degree engineer's-eye-view from inside Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory, with picture-in-picture commentary.

To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.

Please note: Not all browsers support viewing 360 videos. YouTube supports their playback on computers using Chrome, Firefox, Internet Explorer, and Opera browsers. For best experience on a mobile device, play this video in the YouTube app. 2-D video available at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ

Credit: NASA-JPL/Caltech

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn’t an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone’s favorite activity, but it can be very messy — and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one’s outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won’t take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 — The pacifier hack 

2:42 — A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 — The getting along/best friends’ shirt 

7:20 — Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 — Tasty gummy bear lollies
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

snippet.title: Dodge Challenger Demon v Porsche 911 Turbo S - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

It’s time for an almighty USA vs Germany drag race! 

Mat’s in the absolutely huge Dodge Challenge Demon, and he’s lining up against Yianni in the Porsche 911 Turbo S! 

When you compare them on paper, it looks like the Dodge has it in the bag. With a humungous 6.2-litre supercharged V8 under its massive bonnet, the Challenge Demon can put down 808hp and 972Nm! As a result, it seemingly dwarfs the 911 Turbo S, which has a 3.8-litre twin-turbo flat-six, which can produce 650hp & 800Nm. 

But of course, this isn’t the first time we’ve driven a Porsche 911 Turbo S on this channel, and we know you’re pretty much guaranteed a 1/4 mile time of less than 10.5 seconds! 

So how do you think this will play out? Will the Dodge be able to put its power down? Or is the Porsche set to grab another victory? 

You’ll have to keep watching to find out!

Thanks to CS Panda for lending us the Dodge - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxwBVsAoWWkQjKmSKOx5u2A

snippet.title: Cutting a Hole in Nolan's Exhaust to See How Loud it Gets
snippet.description:
Thanks to Off The Record for sponsoring today’s episode. Always Fight Your Tickets with Off The Record. Money back guarantee. Enough said. Register now to use code Donut and save 10% off your 1st ticket at https://www.offtherecord.com/donut

Listen we’ve all been there, picking our first mod. Well chances are the first thing you really wanna do is make your car louder! But what are your options? What if you don’t want to be LOUD ALL THE TIME!? Thankfully we have a Nolan, a Mustang, and a pair of exhaust cut outs! Let’s get loud bby … then quiet… then LOUD AGAIN! Stop reading this, go press play and hope you don’t get an ad lol

Link to the universal exhaust cutouts we used:

https://www.ecstuning.com/b-ecs-parts/c-exhaust-performance-cutout/

We have a new channel! 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOvwuc_zaBzXpEo6Up35jxg

Money Pit is where you get to learn about cars as we work on them. Each ep we’ll breakdown how each component works and then we’ll upgrade it. Join us in our journey to build cool cars, learn about them, and drive the crap out of them!

Some of our best videos ever are coming out soon, stay tuned so you won't miss a thing!

localized.title: Cutting a Hole in Nolan's Exhaust to See How Loud it Gets
localized.description:
Thanks to Off The Record for sponsoring today’s episode. Always Fight Your Tickets with Off The Record. Money back guarantee. Enough said. Register now to use code Donut and save 10% off your 1st ticket at https://www.offtherecord.com/donut

Listen we’ve all been there, picking our first mod. Well chances are the first thing you really wanna do is make your car louder! But what are your options? What if you don’t want to be LOUD ALL THE TIME!? Thankfully we have a Nolan, a Mustang, and a pair of exhaust cut outs! Let’s get loud bby … then quiet… then LOUD AGAIN! Stop reading this, go press play and hope you don’t get an ad lol

Link to the universal exhaust cutouts we used:

https://www.ecstuning.com/b-ecs-parts/c-exhaust-performance-cutout/

We have a new channel! 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOvwuc_zaBzXpEo6Up35jxg

Money Pit is where you get to learn about cars as we work on them. Each ep we’ll breakdown how each component works and then we’ll upgrade it. Join us in our journey to build cool cars, learn about them, and drive the crap out of them!

Some of our best videos ever are coming out soon, stay tuned so you won't miss a thing!
►Subscribe here: http://bit.ly/1JQ3qvO

Check out more Donut Media Videos: https://youtu.be/Pz8IGLgFE2s?list=PLF…

Want a Donut shirt or sticker?  Visit https://shop.donut.media/

Like us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/donutmedia/

Click here if you want to learn more about Donut Media: http://www.donut.media/

Donut Media is at the center of digital media for the next generation of automotive and motorsports enthusiasts. We are drivers, drifters, and car enthusiasts who love to tell stories.

snippet.title: Film Theory: The BIG Mistake of Monsters Inc
snippet.description:
Special thanks to NordVPN for sponsoring this video!
Go to https://NordVPN.com/filmtheory and use code FILMTHEORY 
to get a 2-year plan plus 1 additional month with a huge discount. It’s risk free with Nord’s 30 day money-back guarantee!

By now, most of us know the end of Monsters Inc. The Monsters discover that the screams they've been using as a power source are not the most optimized way to do business. Which, you know, is good to find out given the terror they've been puting generations of kids through. Thanks to the adventures of Sully, Mike and Boo, they find out laughter works even BETTER than the sreams. What I want to know, Theorists, is WHY that is and, more importantly, did the Monsters actually make a big MISTAKE?
